title: Inventory_naruto
description: 1.17-1.18 this resource packs helps inventory change from default to naruto image
body:
### I hope you enjoy it
____
This resource pack will change your inventory from the usual white to an image of Naruto in (sage mode) and using Rasenran in battle. Naruto fans will definitely love it because it looks very cool.
![Naruto ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/460cb35b3977f79578e20eb36dc1c65df02acf91.jpeg)

____
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d473b452dbb15b24142dde1b1870051e9015d34c_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/PfknxDj2y)
